stemHtml: An airfield is reporting low temperatures and high surface pressure. What is the effect that these conditions have on a propeller aircraft performing a go-around?

options.a: Yaw and roll will be less powerful. V<sub>MC</sub> will be unchanged.
options.b: Yaw and roll will be more powerful. V<sub>MC</sub> will be higher.
options.c: Yaw and roll will be less powerful. V<sub>MC</sub> will be higher.
options.d: Yaw will be more powerful. V<sub>MC</sub> will be lower.
